overall.description: Cinematic third-person gameplay footage from a narrative-driven action game, depicting a character hiking through a dense, rain-soaked forest along a cliff edge overlooking a rushing river. The character descends to the riverbank, enters the shallow water, and approaches an ally, with heavy rain and atmospheric fog permeating the environment throughout.

agents.ego_description: hiking along a narrow dirt trail on a forest cliffside, maintaining distance from the edge while rain falls steadily

entered.detail: tall evergreen trees with thick trunks lining the left side of the trail
rocky precipice dropping down to the river below
fast-flowing river with white water rapids visible through the trees
narrow muddy trail winding along the cliff edge

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow dirt trail hugging a rocky cliff edge in a dense pine forest during heavy rain. The river rapids are visible through gaps in the trees to the right, while tall pines tower overhead, partially obscuring the sky.

events.description: trail opens to panoramic view of the river valley and rapids below

agents.ego_description: pausing to survey the expansive river valley, looking down at the rapids and mist rising from the water

entered.detail: wide view of the river valley with multiple channels of rushing water
fog and mist rising from the river surface
tree-covered mountains visible in the hazy distance

segments.scene_description: The trail opens onto a scenic overlook revealing a panoramic view of the river valley below. Mist rises from the rapids as the character surveys the landscape, with the forest canopy giving way to an expansive vista of water and distant mountains.

agents.ego_description: carefully walking down the sloping trail toward the river bank, navigating through dense tree cover

entered.detail: massive pine tree trunks flanking both sides of the narrow trail
gravel and rock shoreline of the river becoming visible through the trees
boulders covered in green moss lining the path

segments.scene_description: The character descends a sloping trail through dense forest, with large tree trunks closing in on both sides. The river bank becomes visible ahead through the trees as the path winds downward toward the water's edge.

events.description: character steps from river bank into shallow river water
ally character becomes visible standing on the left river bank

agents.ego_description: wading into the shallow river, water splashing around boots, approaching an ally waiting on the bank

notable_agents.action: ally standing on the river bank, equipped with backpack and weapon, observing the surroundings

entered.detail: clear shallow water with visible riverbed stones
smooth stones and boulders protruding from the water surface
tree-lined banks of the river on both sides

segments.scene_description: The character enters the shallow river, wading through clear water with visible rocks beneath the surface. An ally stands waiting on the left bank as the camera moves through the rushing water, with forested shores visible on both sides of the river.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic cliffside trail through a vast valley vista and down into a rushing river. It begins with the character navigating a narrow dirt path hugged by towering pines and rocky edges, where river rapids are only partially visible through the dense, rain-soaked foliage. As the trail opens, the forest canopy gives way to a panoramic overlook, revealing a mist-shrouded river valley and distant mountains under a heavy downpour. The scene then shifts as the character descends a sloping path where the trees close in once more, winding downward until the riverbank emerges through the brush. Finally, the camera follows the character as they wade into the shallow, clear water, moving past submerged rocks toward an ally waiting on the forested shore.
